CREDENTIAL EXPOSURE
HIGH
A credential dump referencing this target was located across 2 dark web paste-site indices. Consistent with a third-party breach, not a direct compromise of the target's own infrastructure.
MATCHED TECHNIQUE
Source Code Reconnaissance & Credential Exposure — see TruffleHog and Gitleaks in the Cipher Catalog.
TYPOSQUAT DOMAINS
MEDIUM
4 lookalike domains were identified that closely mimic the target's brand name — a common precursor to phishing campaigns.
MATCHED TECHNIQUE
Typosquat & Lookalike Domain Monitoring — see dnstwist in the Cipher Catalog.
RANSOMWARE CHATTER
LOW
No direct mentions of this target were found across currently tracked ransomware group leak sites. Clean read at time of scan.
STATUS
No further action indicated.
